params.name: Wilford's Engine
params.description:
On Jun 17, 2031 AD, the train powered by Wilford's perpetual motion engine began to move across the vast ice field.
Wilford funded the development of this engine, which has the features of a true perpetual motion machine, as it once ran for seventeen years without any energy supplies. Aside from its numerous energy acquisition channels and extremely high energy utilization, it can also recycle some of the energy lost through vibration and heat, resulting in a powerful performance that is clos …
